steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The blank describes what the fictitious entries were finally recognized as before being deleted. The passage already calls them "hoaxes perpetrated as jokes by mischievous users," so the answer must match that meaning: deliberate, deceptive tricks.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• "enhancements": Enhancements are improvements that add value. Fake entries about nonexistent bands and legislators improve nothing — they deceive. ✗
  • "pranks": Pranks are tricks or jokes played on others. Substituting: "finally recognized as pranks and deleted" matches the passage's own framing of these entries as hoaxes and jokes. ✓
  • "revelations": Revelations are surprising disclosures of truth. Fictitious entries reveal nothing true — they fabricate. ✗
  • "analyses": Analyses are systematic examinations. An invented entry for a made-up punk band is not an analysis of anything. ✗
That matches the correct answer — B is correct.
